foundation.label: Foundation circuit — 2 rounds
foundation.note: All 6 exercises back-to-back, rest 60-90 sec, repeat once more. ~20 min.

build.label: Build circuit — 3 rounds
build.note: All 7 exercises back-to-back, rest 60 sec, repeat 2 more times. ~25 min.

peak.label: Peak circuit — 3 rounds
peak.note: All 8 exercises back-to-back, rest 60 sec, repeat 2 more times. ~30 min.

raceShape.label: Race Shape circuit — 2 rounds
raceShape.note: All 6 back-to-back, rest 60-90 sec, repeat once more. ~20 min.
